name: combatwombat/tiefling: 2D-to-3D image generator and viewer - GitHub
snippet: Generates a depth map with DepthAnythingV2, then renders a 3D parallax view of the image to simulate depth. Runs locally and privately in your browser.

name: viewing stereo images on the web site - StereoPi Forum

name: 3D Stereoscopic Viewer free online application - 3Dthis.com

name: The OWL Stereoscopic Viewer
snippet: The 21st Century standard for Stereoscopic viewing. It's focussing, collapsible, and just a little prismatic to help your eyes in their convergence.
